description: Create final comprehensive evidence summary figure with all 12 lines of evidence and the decisive Faust et al. confirmation result
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(16, 8))
fig.suptitle('Final Evidence Summary: Drosophila Acat1 (Q9W3N9) — GO:0005777 Peroxisome\nVerdict: OVER-ANNOTATED (recommend removal)', 
             fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', y=0.98)

# Panel A: Complete evidence scorecard
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.axis('off')

evidence_lines = [
    ("1. Experimental localization (LOPIT)", "Mitochondrion (HDA)", "#2ecc71", "STRONG"),
    ("2. Phylogenetic inference (IBA)", "Mitochondrion", "#2ecc71", "MODERATE"),
    ("3. C-terminal PTS1 signal (-EKL)", "Non-canonical, disfavored", "#e74c3c", "STRONG"),
    ("4. N-terminal MTS (net charge +5)", "Matches human ACAT1 MTS", "#2ecc71", "STRONG"),
    ("5. Functional context (thiolase II)", "Mitochondrial processes", "#2ecc71", "STRONG"),
    ("6. Human ortholog localization", "Mito ONLY (no peroxisome)", "#e74c3c", "STRONG"),
    ("7. Cholesterol synthesis in Drosophila", "Absent (auxotroph)", "#e74c3c", "STRONG"),
    ("8. AlphaFold N-terminal structure", "Disordered MTS (pLDDT<64)", "#2ecc71", "HIGH"),
    ("9. AlphaFold C-terminal structure", "Buried in fold (pLDDT>97)", "#e74c3c", "HIGH"),
    ("10. Insect ortholog C-terminal cons.", "94% -EKL, 0% canonical PTS1", "#e74c3c", "HIGH"),
    ("11. Faust et al. confirmed proteins", "Acat1 NOT among 6 confirmed", "#e74c3c", "DECISIVE"),
    ("12. Active site conservation", "Thiolase II confirmed", "#2ecc71", "HIGH"),
]

y_start = 0.95
for i, (label, finding, color, strength) in enumerate(evidence_lines):
    y = y_start - i * 0.075
    # Color indicator
    ax1.add_patch(plt.Circle((0.02, y), 0.012, color=color, transform=ax1.transAxes))
    ax1.text(0.05, y, label, transform=ax1.transAxes, fontsize=9, va='center', fontweight='bold')
    ax1.text(0.52, y, finding, transform=ax1.transAxes, fontsize=8.5, va='center', color='#2c3e50')
    ax1.text(0.88, y, f"[{strength}]", transform=ax1.transAxes, fontsize=8, va='center', 
             color='#7f8c8d', fontstyle='italic')

# Legend
ax1.add_patch(plt.Circle((0.05, 0.04), 0.012, color='#2ecc71', transform=ax1.transAxes))
ax1.text(0.08, 0.04, "= Supports mitochondrion", transform=ax1.transAxes, fontsize=8, va='center')
ax1.add_patch(plt.Circle((0.45, 0.04), 0.012, color='#e74c3c', transform=ax1.transAxes))
ax1.text(0.48, 0.04, "= Refutes peroxisome", transform=ax1.transAxes, fontsize=8, va='center')

ax1.set_title('A. Complete Evidence Scorecard (12 lines of evidence)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', pad=15)

# Panel B: Faust et al. confirmed proteins
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.axis('off')

confirmed_text = """FAUST et al. 2012 (PMID:22758915)
Experimentally Confirmed Peroxisomal Proteins (IDA):

  ★ Agps    — Alkylglycerone-phosphate synthase
  ★ CRAT    — Carnitine acetyltransferase
  ★ Ccs     — Copper chaperone for SOD
  ★ CG17544 — Uncharacterized protein
  ★ Mtpalpha — Mitochondrial trifunctional protein α
  ★ Sod1    — Superoxide dismutase

NOT confirmed (ISM prediction only):
  ✗ Acat1   — Acetoacetyl-CoA thiolase
  ✗ (and many other predicted proteins)

────────────────────────────────────
CURATION RECOMMENDATION:

  REMOVE:  GO:0005777 (peroxisome) [ISM]
  RETAIN:  GO:0005739 (mitochondrion) [HDA]

  Acat1 is a mitochondrial thiolase II.
  The peroxisome ISM annotation is a
  computational artifact that should be
  removed from the gene record.
────────────────────────────────────
"""

ax2.text(0.05, 0.95, confirmed_text, transform=ax2.transAxes, fontsize=9.5,
         fontfamily='monospace', verticalalignment='top',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.8', facecolor='#fef9e7', alpha=0.9, edgecolor='#f39c12'))
ax2.set_title('B. Key Gap Closed: Faust et al. Confirmed Proteins', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', pad=15)

plt.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0, 1, 0.94])
plt.savefig('final_evidence_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Final evidence summary figure saved.")
